peripheral_requirement.purpose: 3-phase complementary center-aligned PWM on TOM1 with CH0 as time base

mapping_verification.reference: IfxGtm_PinMap.h (TC38x LFBGA-516 mapping table for Port 02 TOUT)
mapping_verification.instruction: Confirm the exact TOUT index and TOM1 channel ownership for P02.0, P02.7, P02.1, P02.4, P02.2, and P02.5. Use the TC38x LFBGA-516 table in IfxGtm_PinMap.h.
mapping_verification.fallback_procedure: If TOM1 does not own the required P02.* TOUT on TC387 LFBGA-516, re-map to the TOM instance that owns those TOUTs on LFBGA-516 or select alternate pins that share a common TOM instance; update tom_allocation accordingly.

tom_allocation.tom_module: TOM1 (preferred; confirm P02.* support on TOM1 for TC38x package 516)
tom_allocation.notes: If P02.* are not available on TOM1, select an alternate TOM instance matching the TOUT of P02.* and keep CH0 as time base on that TOM.
tom_allocation.verification_reference: IfxGtm_PinMap.h -> TC38x LFBGA-516 mapping table (Port 02 TOUT to TOM ownership)
verification_steps: Open IfxGtm_PinMap.h and locate the TC38x LFBGA-516 table.
Find P02.0, P02.1, P02.2, P02.4, P02.5, and P02.7 entries and record their TOUT number and owning TOM instance/channel.
Ensure all selected outputs are provided by the same TOM instance; if not, choose the TOM instance that owns the majority and realign pin selection or switch tom_module.
Assign channel_pairs in ascending TOM channel order corresponding to the resolved TOUTs, keeping CH0 as time base on the selected TOM instance.
tom_allocation.fallback_procedure: If TOM1 is not the owner of any required P02.* TOUT on TC387 LFBGA-516, set tom_module to the owning TOM instance per IfxGtm_PinMap.h and reassign channel_pairs to valid channels for those TOUTs; maintain CH0 as time_base_channel on the chosen TOM.

device_configuration.package_clarification: Target: TC387 LFBGA-516 (not KIT_A2G_TC387_5V_TFT LFBGA-292). Use TC38x LFBGA-516 TOUT/TOM mapping.

peripheral_usage.GTM_TOM: 3-phase complementary center-aligned PWM generation using IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl (TOM1 with CH0 as time base)
peripheral_usage.Port: Pad configuration, using IfxGtm_PinMap.h for TOUT selection
